name: Framework Laptop 13 (AMD Ryzen 7040) -- Insyde H2O IFR30.03.04 + LapEE UKI v1.0

attributes.tpm-vendor: AMD fTPM (firmware TPM, part of PSP)
attributes.pcr-11-note: Measures the UKI image hash when booted via systemd-stub; this value is the LapEE v1.0 USB-image UKI (kernel+initrd+cmdline PE-section digest).
attributes.pcr-7-note: Secure Boot is DISABLED on this capture; PCR 7 therefore reflects the 'no-SB' well-known state (MokListTrusted / EV_EFI_VARIABLE_AUTHORITY with Framework Platform Key entries present in db but not enforced).

notes: Captured 2026-04-22 from Sam's Framework 13 AMD Ryzen laptop (Insyde H2O BIOS IFR30.03.04) booting the LapEE v1.0 USB image. The USB boot sequence: UEFI -> \EFI\Boot\BootX64.efi (systemd-stub UKI) -> Linux kernel -> initramfs-hb init -> HyperBEAM foreground -> /~tpm@2.0a/attestation -> ESP writeback -> extracted here. The quoted PCR set was [0,1,7,10,11,14,15] with sha256 digest XNmjDaR7ttYFK8dwgjE8DTcf_CQqD6fFUvoKpKjomDY. This profile is the first `real-hardware` Framework firmware fingerprint in the corpus and enables pcr-match confidence to jump from `no-match` to `high` on subsequent Framework 13 IFR30.03.04 captures.
